• Procedural mining world with drill tiers, AOE, and explosions.
  • UI includes mobile controls, dashboard, shop, warp, and custom modal system.
  • Networking supports host election, sync, and trade via MQTT.
    Game.init()
    Shop.buy('drill')

This HTML page creates a 2‑D mining game called Mega Miner NG with a procedurally generated map, drilling mechanics, and a full UI for inventory, shop, and chat. It features multiplayer support through MQTT, host election, and a custom modal system for prompts, confirmations, and trade dialogs. The rendering pipeline uses canvas optimizations, weather effects, and adaptable gauge styles for both desktop and mobile layouts.
